---
title: Data
---

`q.data` collects everything data-related under one namespace:

| Submodule | What it is |
|---|---|
| `q.data.datasets` | prepackaged sample OHLCV data (AAPL, SPY, BTC-USD), works offline |
| `q.data.local` (`q.data.load`/`q.data.save`) | load/save local parquet or csv files |
| `q.data.sources` | downloadable market data vendors and generic backends, one submodule each |

Pages:

- [Sample datasets](datasets.ipynb) — the bundled offline OHLCV history and
  demo strategy trade logs.
- [Data schemas](schemas.ipynb) — the canonical OHLCV-bars and trades-format
  layouts everything else relies on.
- [Local files](local.ipynb) — `q.data.load`/`q.data.save` for parquet/csv.
- [Market data sources](sources.ipynb) — Yahoo Finance, Binance, and DuckDB
  backends.
